info.title: GLOW API
info.description: Auto-generated OpenAPI schema from FastAPI v3 API

post.description: Get profile details with role visibility check.
Update profile fields - supports both simple auth updates and comprehensive staff updates.
Create a new profile.
Delete a profile.
Create or update a profile based on email.
Get default profile structure for creation mode.
Get profile by email (for auth operations).

Get consolidated profile context (profile, departments, cohorts, breadcrumbs).

NOTE: Theme derivation stays in Python because it requires complex color math utilities
(hex_to_oklch, ensure_contrast, shade, tint) that are not available in PostgreSQL.
All other business logic is handled in SQL (see get_profile_context_complete.sql).
Check if emulation is authorized.
Search profiles that can be emulated by the requester.
Get scenarios list with all relationships.
Get detailed scenario information.
Get default scenario structure for creation mode.
Create a new scenario.
Update an existing scenario.
Duplicate a scenario.
Delete a scenario.
Get simulations list with permissions and relationships.
Get detailed simulation information.
Get default simulation details based on profile.
Create a new simulation.
Update an existing simulation.
Duplicate a simulation.
Delete a simulation (with usage check).
Get personas list with permissions and scenario details.
Get detailed persona information.
Get default persona structure for creation mode.
Create a new persona.
Update an existing persona.
Duplicate a persona.
Delete a persona.
Get auth list with item counts and permissions.
Get detailed auth information with nested items and keys.
Get default auth detail for creation mode.
Create a new auth entry with nested items.
Update an existing auth entry (replace all items).
Duplicate an auth entry with all items and their key associations.
Delete an auth entry.
Get list of active auth provider options and departments for login page.
Get list of departments with computed fields.
Get department detail with permissions, stats, and settings.
Get default department detail for creation mode.
Create a new department.
Update a department.
Duplicate a department.
Delete a department (with usage check).
Get cohorts list with permissions and relationships.
Get cohort detail with staff, simulations, and mappings.
Get default cohort detail with staff, simulations, and mappings.
Duplicate a cohort with relationships.
Remove profile from cohort (leave cohort).
Create a new cohort.
Update an existing cohort.
Delete a cohort.
Search profiles for adding to a cohort (excludes profiles already in cohort if cohortId provided).
Get documents list with tags and scenarios.
Get document detail information.
Create a new document.
Delete a document.
Update a document.
Generate a certificate PDF/text for a profile.
Render Jinja2 template with template args and theme injection.

schema.title: Response Render Document Template Api V3 Documents Render Post

post.description: Get evals list with status derivation and permissions.
Get detailed eval information.
Get default eval detail with departments, agents, and rubrics mappings.
Create a new eval.
Update an existing eval.
Delete an eval.
Get rubrics list with hierarchical structure and permissions.
Get rubric detail information.
Get default rubric detail information.
Duplicate a rubric with entire hierarchy.
Create a new rubric with nested structure.
Update an existing rubric (replaces entire hierarchy).
Delete a rubric.
Get list of all settings ordered by created_at DESC.
Get detailed settings information.
Update settings (creates new active row, deactivates old).
Refresh the analytics materialized view.
Create or recreate the analytics materialized view with all indexes.
Get activity bundle with header metrics.
Get paginated list of activity entries.
Get complete dashboard bundle with all metrics, history, insights, and mappings.
Get paginated dashboard history with search, filters, sorting, and pagination.
Export reports data as CSV or ZIP file.
Get reports bundle with aggregated metrics per profile and entity mappings.
Get complete reports overview bundle for individual profile - requires profileId.
Get paginated reports history for individual profile - requires profileId.
Get leaderboard bundle with all metrics and profile data.
Get list of agents with permissions.
Get agent detail with debug info and metadata.
Get default agent detail metadata for creating new agents.
Create a new agent.
Update an agent.
Duplicate an agent.
Delete an agent.
Get keys list with permissions and relationships.
Get key detail information.
Get default key detail information for new key creation.
Create a new key.
Update an existing key.
Delete a key with permission checks.
Decrypt a key's encrypted value.
Get models list (flat structure with provider info).
Get detailed model information.
Get default model detail for creation mode (provider mapping).
Create a new model.
Update an existing model.
Delete a model if not in use.
Duplicate a model.
Get providers list with permissions and endpoint info.
Get provider detail information.
Get default provider detail information for new provider creation.
Create a new provider.
Update an existing provider.
Delete a provider (prevents deletion if used by models).
Get parameters list with item counts and permissions.
Get detailed parameter information with nested items.
Get default parameter detail for creation mode.
Create a new parameter with nested items.
Update an existing parameter (replace all items).
Duplicate a parameter with all items and their department associations.
Delete a parameter if items not in use.
Get fields list with permissions and relationships.
Get detailed field information.
Get default field detail for creation mode.
Create a new field with parameter and department associations.
Update an existing field.
Duplicate a field with all parameter and department associations.
Delete a field.
Create new app feedback entry.
Get list of all feedback entries.
Resolve or unresolve a feedback entry.
Get health bundle with health KPIs and metrics.
Bulk archive or unarchive simulation attempts.
Get complete attempt data with all related entities and computed values.
Get complete eval attempt data with all runs and status.
Delete a prompt.
Get profile/staff list with permissions and relationships.
Get staff profile details with role visibility check.
Get default staff structure for creation mode.
Search staff with query and filters.
Process CSV file and map columns to target fields.
Get all data needed for create staff UI (mappings, etc.).
Bulk create profiles.
Bulk update profiles.
Bulk delete profiles.
Bulk create or update staff members.
Get benchmark bundle with evals list and eval attempts list.

Get home overview with items and mappings.

Home always shows general simulations only (no simulationFilters parameter).
Bundle only returns top half (items + mappings), history is separate endpoint.
Get paginated home history with search, filters, sorting, and pagination.

Get practice overview data with history and all entity mappings.

Practice uses simplified filters: only profileId and departmentIds.
No cohort/role/date filtering for personal practice.
Get paginated practice history with search, filters, sorting, and pagination.
Get pricing metrics with model usage and cost analysis.
Get paginated, filtered, searched, sorted pricing runs for table.
Get detailed pricing run or group information with all messages.

schema.title: Response Get Pricing Run Detail Api V3 Pricing Detail Post

options.description: Handle OPTIONS request for tus protocol discovery.

post.description: Handle POST request for tus protocol - create upload.

options.description: Handle OPTIONS request for specific upload.

head.description: Handle HEAD request for tus protocol - get upload info.

patch.description: Handle PATCH request for tus protocol - upload chunk.

post.description: Finalize a TUS upload and create upload record.

get.description: Download an upload by ID. If preview=True and file is PDF, returns first page as PNG.

get.description:
Rich health endpoint for dashboard.

Returns per-service status + latencies.
Automatically logs health checks to database when called by notify service.

post.description:
Trigger metrics snapshot to database.

Called by notify service to log metrics snapshot.
No leader election needed since notify service is single instance.
